title: capsella alandica
intro: Capsella alandica, also known as the Aland cress or Alandland cress, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that is native to the Åland Islands, a region in the Baltic Sea. The medicinal properties of Capsella alandica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Capsella alandica can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
